name: Cloud Nine Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups fine graham cracker crumbs (18-20 crackers)
1 package fluffy white, or lemon fluff
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the graham cracker crumbs, cinnamon, and brown sugar.
2. Add butter and mix well to form a paste.
3. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom and sides of an 8-inch square pan.
FILLING:
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Soften the cream cheese.
6. Press the cottage cheese and salt through a sieve into a large mixing bowl containing the softened cream cheese.
7. Mix in the frosting mix according to package directions.
8. Gradually beat in the prepared frosting and flavoring.
9. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 35 minutes.
11. Allow to cool, then refrigerate.
12. Top each serving with fresh or frozen strawberries, thawed.
Serves: 9-12
